title: Chairify
description: Create sittable spots near everywhere in Minecraft vanilla.
body:
Chairify is a simple and light datapack that allows you to create sittable spots near everywhere in Minecraft vanilla. Chill mode activated! ## Features - Instant sit using the SneakToSit method (see screenshot). This temporary spot will be removed automaticly when you go away. - Create temporary spot (manualy) using ```/trigger ChairSit``` - Create permanent spot (manualy only) using ```/trigger ChairCreate``` - Remove spot using ```/trigger ChairRemove``` ## What's the difference with other SIT datapack?! It's a sit-spot creator. The main difference is, with this datapack, you chose where you want people to sit by pre-creating spots. You have the choice between pre-creating spots and/or let players create temporary and/or permanent spots. For instance, you can create a few permanent spot in a meeting room: those spot will be usable for every players that click it, now or later. Or you can disable permanent spot creation, and only use temporary spot which delete themselve if no there is no player around. ## Datapack's Options In game, use: ```/function fkcf:options/get```

Patreon Version The free versions are designed to be fun and fully playable. The Patreon version is for players and server owners who want more control, comfort, and flexibility through an in-game settings menu to tweak the parameters live, without file editing. Becoming a Gold Patreon also means: - Getting access to every Patreon versions of every projects. - Getting your name listed in each project and on this page (see above). - Supporting long-term development, updates, and new features 💛
Mod Version Mod packaging is designed to be more convenient for your installations. Executed on the server side, it does not need to be installed on the client side. Keep in mind that inside the mod is simply a datapack. In addition, interactions between too many mods can degrade the functioning of one or more mods.
